data.body:
## Description

Replace _CVF_TK_LOG and _SS_TK_LOG tk mock patterns with v3 ticket command mocks in hook tests. Affected files:

1. tests/hooks/test-check-validation-failures.sh:
   - Lines 85-107: Replace _CVF_TK_LOG fake-tk with a mock 'ticket' command
   - Rename _CVF_TK_LOG -> _CVF_TICKET_LOG
   - Replace `echo "$@" >> "$TK_LOG"` with `echo "$@" >> "$TICKET_LOG"`
   - Update assertions that check TK_LOG for 'create' to check TICKET_LOG

2. tests/hooks/test-session-safety.sh:
   - Lines 73-91: Replace _SS_TK_LOG fake-tk with mock 'ticket' command
   - Rename _SS_TK_LOG -> _SS_TICKET_LOG
   - Update assertions accordingly

## TDD Requirement
T1 (10f6-325d) must be complete first. After T3, run test-v2-clean-guard.sh to confirm test_no_cvf_tk_log_in_hook_tests passes GREEN.

## Files to edit
- tests/hooks/test-check-validation-failures.sh
- tests/hooks/test-session-safety.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test-check-validation-failures.sh contains no _CVF_TK_LOG
  Verify: ! grep -q '_CVF_TK_LOG\|_SS_TK_LOG' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-check-validation-failures.sh
- [ ] test-session-safety.sh contains no _SS_TK_LOG
  Verify: ! grep -q '_SS_TK_LOG' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-session-safety.sh
- [ ] test_no_cvf_tk_log_in_hook_tests guard passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh 2>&1 | grep 'test_no_cvf_tk_log_in_hook_tests.*PASS'
